seed_instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair.
org_constraint: The "body" key must contain exactly 100 words.
new_constraint: The "body" key must contain at least six sentences, with each containing at least 20 words.
instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The "body" key must contain exactly 100 words. The "body" key must contain at least six sentences, with each containing at least 20 words.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Repair Status - Laptop - [Your Laptop Make and Model]

Dear [Repair Shop Name] Team,

I am writing to respectfully inquire about the current status of the laptop repair that I entrusted to your skilled technicians approximately [Number] weeks ago. My device is a [Your Laptop Make and Model] and the reference or service ticket number for this repair is [Service/Ticket Number], which I noted when dropping it off. I understand that complex repairs sometimes require more time than initially anticipated, but I would greatly appreciate an update regarding the progress of the diagnostics or the completion of the necessary repairs. Could you please provide me with an estimated timeframe for when I might expect my laptop to be fully functional and ready for pickup? Knowing the expected completion date would be extremely helpful for my work schedule and personal needs moving forward. Thank you very much for your time and attention to this important matter; I look forward to your prompt and informative reply soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
